Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server

Interface RestContext.ContextKind

All Known Implementing Classes:
RestContext.ContextKind.Child, RestContext.ContextKind.Mixin, RestContext.ContextKind.Root
Enclosing class:
RestContext
public static sealed interface RestContext.ContextKind permits RestContext.ContextKind.Root, RestContext.ContextKind.Child, RestContext.ContextKind.Mixin
The build-time kind of a RestContext — which of the three construction flavors produced it.

Replaces the former boolean mixinContext flag on RestContext.Args with a typed discriminator so the three flavors are explicit and self-documenting at every call site, and so the MIXIN flavor can carry the RestContext.ResolvedMixin that produced it (the single home for the host-declared override payload, consumed at build time when the mixin sub-context resolves its settings).

Mixin vs. child asymmetry (important — do not assume symmetry): a RestContext.ContextKind.Mixin sub-context is parent-linked to the host and inherits the host's @Rest annotation chain (RestContext.getRestAnnotationsForProperty(String) walks host→mixin), so @Mixin overrides layer on top of an inherited chain. A RestContext.ContextKind.Child is isolated (RestContext.HOST_ONLY_PROPERTIES includes children; children retain pre-10.0.0 isolated resolution with no parent walk). So a future @Child would seed settings onto an isolated context rather than override an inherited chain, and would have no noInherit analog — it must NOT reuse the mixin override-resolution path. The Child variant is intentionally shaped so it can later widen to reference a ResolvedChild (mirroring how Mixin references a ResolvedMixin) without re-plumbing this discriminator. See MAYBE-182 for the parked @Child design.

Since:
10.0.0

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    RestContext.ContextKind.Child
    A routed child resource (mounted via @Rest(children)); isolated resolution.
    static final record 
    RestContext.ContextKind.Mixin
    A per-mixin sub-context (composed via Rest.mixins()/Rest.mixinDefs()); inherits the host chain.
    static final record 
    RestContext.ContextKind.Root
    A top-level (host) resource, mock context, or servlet-mounted resource.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final RestContext.ContextKind
    CHILD
    Shared RestContext.ContextKind.Child singleton (the path override travels in RestContext.Args.path(), not here).
    static final RestContext.ContextKind
    ROOT
    Shared RestContext.ContextKind.Root singleton (the common case).
